open.name: Copper and silver mix
open.note: Standard coinage; full value in stable jurisdiction

open.name: Worn tools (thieves' kit)
open.note: Legal everywhere; fence takes 30% if sold off-book

open.name: Common clothing, travel gear
open.note: No provenance drama; easy to move

guild.name: Raw alchemical reagents
guild.note: Guilds pay fair; no haggling needed

guild.name: Scribed formulae (non-magical)
guild.note: Academy interest; information asymmetry if rare

faction.name: Intel scraps (names, dates)
faction.note: Faction currency — trade for favors, not gp

faction.name: Token of allegiance
faction.note: Worth more as proof of contact than sold

black.name: Stolen petty cash

black.name: Unmarked goods

political.name: Seal or signet (minor house)

guild.name: Rare herbs (alchemical)
guild.note: Guild pays above market; known demand

guild.name: Masterwork components (unworked)
guild.note: Information asymmetry if guild is desperate

faction.name: Beast components (Emerald Enclave)
faction.note: Faction currency; trade for land intel

black.name: Stolen trade goods

black.name: Forged papers

political.name: Noble house ledger (excerpt)

political.name: Gift-quality goods
political.note: Provenance matters — villain's enemies pay premium

open.name: Masterwork shortbow
open.note: Full value in peacetime; +60% in faction war

guild.name: Spellcraft tools
guild.note: Academy demand; double if they're short

faction.name: Military surplus (Lords' Alliance)
faction.note: Faction deal: favors or intel, not gp

black.note: Fence tax; legitimate buyer far more valuable

black.name: Confiscated goods

political.name: Proof of noble wrongdoing

black.name: Necromantic scroll

faction.name: Divine relic
